zh.Gudhem, Västra Götaland, Sweden: 瑞典維亞斯特拉 格塔藍德古德姆
zh.Søderup, Rødekro, Sønderjylland, Danmark: 丹麥奧德藍德洛德可洛奧德盧普
zh.Slangerup, Frederiksborg, Denmark: 丹麥福雷德利可斯波格斯朗格盧普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark於1060年之前出生在丹麥福雷德利可斯波格斯朗格盧普時，他的父親King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark40歲，母親Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark40歲。他和Boedil Thurgotsdatter至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1103年7月10日在塞浦路斯帕福斯，埋葬在塞浦路斯帕福斯。

zh-hans.Gudhem, Västra Götaland, Sweden: 瑞典維亞斯特拉 格塔藍德古德姆
zh-hans.Søderup, Rødekro, Sønderjylland, Danmark: 丹麦奧德藍德洛德可洛奧德盧普
zh-hans.Slangerup, Frederiksborg, Denmark: 丹麦福雷德利可斯波格斯朗格盧普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark于1060年之前出生在丹麦福雷德利可斯波格斯朗格盧普时，他的父亲King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark40岁，母亲Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark40岁。他和Boedil Thurgotsdatter至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1103年7月10日在塞浦路斯帕福斯，埋葬在塞浦路斯帕福斯。

nameMeanings.name: Svendsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorn, Erik, Knut, Lars, Niels, Per, Thor, Astrid, Britt, Carsten, Einer, Evald.
Danish and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name Svend, from Old Norse Sveinn, originally a byname meaning ‘boy, servant’. Compare Svenson , Swanson , Swendsen , Swensen , and Swenson .

variants.name: Svenson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Sven, Erik, Bjorn, Dagny.  German Kurt, Gerhard, Irmgard.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Svensson  . This surname is also found in Denmark, northern Germany, and Norway.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish   Svensen   or   Svendsen  , cognates of 1.

variants.name: Svenningsen
meanings: Danish and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name Svenning, a variant of Sveinung, from Old Norse Sveinn (see Svendsen ) + the suffix -ung ‘son of’.

variants.name: Swendsen
meanings: Americanized form of Danish and Norwegian   Svendsen  . Compare   Swensen  .

nameMeanings.name: Erik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Later variant of   Eirik  , now in frequent use, especially in Sweden.

variants.name: Eric
meanings: Of Old Norse origin, from ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’ ( see Eirik ). It was introduced into Britain by Scandinavian settlers before the Norman Conquest. As a modern given name, it was revived in the mid 19th century and has remained in use since.

variants.name: Eirik
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Eirikr, a compound of ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’.

en.lifeSummary: When Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark was born before 1060, in Slangerup, Frederiksborg, Denmark, his father, King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark, was 40 and his mother, Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark, was 40. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Boedil Thurgotsdatter. He died on 10 July 1103, in Paphos, Cyprus, and was buried in Paphos, Cyprus.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark est né avant 1060, à Slangerup, Frederiksborg, Danemark, son père, King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Boedil Thurgotsdatter. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1103, à Paphos, Chypre, et a été enterré à Paphos, Chypre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark vor 1060 in Slangerup, Frederiksborg, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark 40 und seine Mutter Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark 40. Er hatte mit Boedil Thurgotsdatter mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Juli 1103 in Paphos, Zypern und wurde in Paphos, Zypern begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark è nato il prima del 1060 nel Slangerup, Frederiksborg, Danimarca, il suo padre, King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Boedil Thurgotsdatter. Morì il 10 luglio 1103, nel Paphos, Cipro, e fu sepolto a Paphos, Cipro.

ja.Gudhem, Västra Götaland, Sweden: スウェーデンvaストラ グoタランドグドヘム
ja.Søderup, Rødekro, Sønderjylland, Danmark: デンマークスoンデルジイランドルoデクロスoデルップ
ja.Slangerup, Frederiksborg, Denmark: デンマークフレデリクスボルグスランジャーウップ
ja.lifeSummary: Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmarkが1060年以前にデンマークフレデリクスボルグスランジャーウップで生まれた時，父King Svend II Estridsen of Denmarkは40歳，母Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmarkは40歳であった。彼はBoedil Thurgotsdatterとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1103年7月10日にキプロスプアフォスで死去し，キプロスプアフォスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark(이)가 1060년 이전 덴마크 프레더릭스볼그 슬랭루프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Boedil Thurgotsdatter(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1103년 7월 10일 키프로스 파포스에서 사망했으며 키프로스 파포스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark nasceu antes 1060, em Slangerup, Frederiksborg, Dinamarca, seu pai, King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Boedil Thurgotsdatter. Ele faleceu em 10 de julho de 1103, em Paphos, Chipre, e foi sepultado em Paphos, Chipre.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark родился перед 1060 г. в местности слангируп, фредириксборг, Дания, его отцу по имени King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark, 40. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Boedil Thurgotsdatter. Он умер 10 июля 1103 г. в местности пафос, Кипр и был похоронен в местности пафос, Кипр.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Erik I "Ejegod" Svendsen King of Denmark nació antes de 1060, en Slangerup, Frederiksborg, Dinamarca, su papá, King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Boedil Thurgotsdatter. Murió el 10 de julio de 1103, en Paphos, Chipre, y fue sepultado en Paphos, Chipre.
